transcript.clean_text: the final day of the second week of the tour de france meant the writers would take on one of the hardest stages that are in complete control in the general classification or it seemed as everybody lined up to head to andorra the riders traveling from east to west across the pyrenees leaving sere and into the mountains proper some big climbs on the menu including the highest point of the tour de france at por den valida 2 408 meters above sea level well the 191 kilometer stage started uphill not part of the classified climbing but a good part of the four and a half thousand meters of total climbing in the day race did calm down after around 20 to 30 kilometers and a huge group of 32 riders managed to get up the road there'll be plenty of sprints for green jersey points michael matthews taking those and king of the mountains points to michael woods starting the day in the polkadot jersey but he had plenty of challenges wild pools the chief challenger but also want fanart on the long valley road up into andorra things calmed down until ineos and movie star began riding in the gc group a gap of 10 minutes soon started to reduce up ahead it looked as though the break would take the stage and michael woods was kicking things off but the two ineos grenadiers members of the break were pulled back to help in the gc battle naido quintana was trying to win arque samsung's first ever tour de france stage and in turn battled back the king of the mountains jersey behind kriatkovsky and thomas were ready to go to work bogatya was soon isolated lopez and a couple of others lost contact reinforcements a ride for the british team and much of this stage would be about descent and with jersey open flapping in the wind after having moved up to second on gc mata was losing time the day after cepcus attacked with just under 20 kilometers to go one of three riders in the breakaway from jumbo fissimet went over the final climb of the day 20 odd seconds his advantage over alberto behind uran kalapaz vingo and the rest will have a try at trying to distance today none of that worked however pogaccha is still looking in supreme control at the top embryonic mass and wilco calderman followed well as cuss on home roads as a resident of the principality of andorra would make sure balberde would not come back to him while fenata dropped back to the yellow jersey group was doing his best to try and put pogaccha under pressure in favor of vingo and ben o'connor was also moving up in the gc today's stage honors however went to sepkus already a win at the welter now a stage winner at the tour de france two mountain stage wins for jumbo visma and a tour where they'd lost their leader not a bad return in the end for the dutch team alejandro valverde rolled back the years to finish second and cuss a new american winner at the tour de france because ahead of balberry with pools up there for third place good rides too from izagire quintana gordu and the rest bingo celebrated his teammates victory as the yellow jersey group crossed the line no major changes at the top of the general classification bar that dropping from mata down from second to ninth of course he'd already lost contact on that first major descent five eighteen then zoran's back up the second winger goal is on the podium again at 5 32 but a second back richard karapas in the king of the mountains jersey walt pools returning to the podium he now leads by eight points ahead of michael woods quintana's just too further back and look at walt fernat already to challenge for the polkadot jersey rest day is next in andorra and after that the peloton will head back down the valley into southern france you
